name: Bacon-Broiled Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse scallops with cold water to remove sand from crevices.
2. Pat dry.
3. Preheat broiler.
4. Cut each bacon slice in half crosswise.
5. Wrap each half around a scallop and secure with a toothpick.
6. Sprinkle lightly with salt and seasoned pepper.
7. Broil for 8-10 minutes, turning frequently to ensure even browning of the bacon.
8. Continue broiling until scallops turn opaque throughout.
9. Remove toothpicks.
10. Arrange on platter and garnish with lemon wedges.
